name: Chicken Potato Caesar Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound new potatoes, boiled, drained and sliced
1 large head of romaine lettuce, washed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice chicken breasts into strips and season with salt and pepper.
2. In a non-stick skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add chicken and cook until golden brown and no longer pink in the middle, about 4-5 minutes. Remove chicken to paper towels to drain.
4. Combine chicken and sliced boiled potatoes in a large bowl and set aside.
5. For the dressing, combine garlic, mustard, vinegar, and two pinches of salt in a blender. Process until smooth.
6. Add mayonnaise and blend together to form a thick base.
7. Slowly add olive oil through the hole in the lid of the blender.
8. Scrape dressing into a bowl and season to taste with salt, pepper, and lemon juice. If desired, add anchovy for a deeper, saltier flavor.
9. Toss chicken and potatoes with 3 or 4 tablespoons of the dressing.
10. Place torn romaine lettuce leaves in a large bowl and toss with several tablespoons of the dressing.
11. Arrange lettuce on a plate and top with chicken and potatoes. Garnish with chopped parsley and anchovies, if desired.
Yield: 2 servings
